query: low risk prostate cancer treatment selection comorbidities active surveillance versus definitive treatment guidelines

results.title: Risk factors for low back pain amongst adults in Nigeria and South Africa: a systematic review.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 39604993. 2024/11/27 00:00. BACKGROUND: The burden on the individual, society and healthcare providers of 
low back pain in the western world is well documented. Globalisation and 
urbanisation, it has been reported, has led to an increase in low back pain in 
developing countries such as those situated in Sub-Saharan Africa. Low back pain 
determinants are framed, according to the individual, social and cultural 
context. The aim of this systematic review was to determine the risk fa
